source_limitations: The report's linked JSON/CSV exports were not attached. This artifact contains the 44 concepts reconstructable from the report text and applies metadata only where the text supplies a sufficiently specific primary-source finding.

cafes.name: Labora
cafes.address: 8055 Clairemont Mesa Blvd, Ste 101, San Diego, CA 92111

updates.menu_summary: Current official menu documents ten matcha preparations with exact names and prices.
Current official menu lists four matcha items and warns that offerings change frequently.
updates.status_note: Official site currently lists Monday–Thursday 7am–2pm and Friday–Sunday 7am–4pm.

updates.menu_summary: The current official Top Shelf Matcha section lists nine drinks at $7.50 each.

Official site confirms coffee and matcha service, but the linked drink-menu page did not expose a usable current item list.
